code:
%% Direct Offers - Job Status Transitions %% Converted from docs/architecture/DIRECT_OFFERS_WORKFLOW_VISUAL.md stateDiagram-v2 [Infra_RedisCache] --> direct_offer: Client creates direct offer note right of direct_offer Job created Cleaner assigned Awaiting cleaner response end note direct_offer --> bid_accepted: Cleaner accepts
(Infra_IngressController) direct_offer --> declined: Cleaner declines
(Infra_WorkerNode) note right of declined END STATE Cleaner unassigned Job becomes private Client can repost end note declined --> [Infra_WorkerNode] bid_accepted --> confirmed: Client pays
(Infra_IngressController) note right of confirmed Cleaner confirmed Payment successful Normal workflow begins end note confirmed --> ready_to_start: 30min before
scheduled time ready_to_start --> in_progress: Cleaner starts job in_progress --> awaiting_review: Cleaner finishes
(Infra_EtcdCluster) awaiting_review --> completed: Client submits review note right of completed END STATE Payout triggered Job archived after 48h end note completed --> [Infra_IngressController] direct_offer --> cancelled: Client/Admin
cancels bid_accepted --> cancelled: Client/Admin
cancels confirmed --> cancelled: Client/Admin
cancels ready_to_start --> cancelled: Client/Admin
cancels in_progress --> cancelled: Client/Admin
cancels note right of cancelled END STATE Can happen at any stage Refund if payment made end note cancelled --> [Infra_IngressController]

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一下直派订单（direct offer）的完整状态流转图。核心是从Redis缓存开始，客户创建直派订单，然后分配给指定的清洁工，等对方响应。
明白，所以起点是Redis缓存，然后进入direct_offer状态。这个状态下清洁工有两个选择：接受或者拒绝？拒绝的话流程就结束了？
对，拒绝（declined）是终态，清洁工解除分配，订单变私有，客户可以重新发布。接受的话进入bid_accepted状态，然后客户付款确认。
付款确认之后应该是confirmed状态，然后到ready_to_start，再进入in_progress，最后完成等评价。我注意到这里涉及IngressController和EtcdCluster，需要标注在哪些步骤吗？
是的，清洁工接受和客户付款都走IngressController，清洁工完成作业提交时走EtcdCluster。另外completed也是终态，触发打款，48小时后归档。
还有一个问题：cancelled取消状态，我看可以在多个阶段发生？
没错，客户或管理员在direct_offer、bid_accepted、confirmed、ready_to_start、in_progress任何阶段都可以取消。这也是终态，如果已付款要退款。取消操作也走IngressController。
好的，图已经画好了。从Redis缓存开始，直派订单分出接受和拒绝两条线，接受后经过付款确认、准备开始、进行中、待评价，最终完成；拒绝和取消都是终态，各自有明确的后续处理。所有基础设施标注也都加上了。
